1267201.name: Dissonance
1267201.summary: Players periodically damage allies in the opposing realm when standing too close to them.

advice.generic: Keep realm groups spaced from each other. If you are in the opposite realm from nearby allies, move so Dissonance does not splash them.
advice.healer: Expect avoidable spot damage when realm groups drift through each other during swaps.
advice.dps: Check your realm and avoid standing on allies who are not in it.

1282001.name: Alndust Upheaval
1282001.summary: Targets players and knocks victims into the Rift, giving them Alnsight so they can interact with Manifestations.

advice.generic: Use Alndust Upheaval assignments to send the right players into the Rift, then swap back before Rift-only mechanics overwhelm them.
advice.tank: Keep Chimaerus stable so the targeted players can land and orient in the Rift quickly.
advice.healer: Watch Upheaval victims as they transition realms; they may be separated from normal healing windows.
advice.dps: If sent into the Rift, swap to Manifestations immediately instead of tunneling the boss.

1282001.notes: Heroic/Mythic journal variant; child damage can appear as 1282073.

1282073.name: Alndust Upheaval
1282073.summary: The player-hit damage from Alndust Upheaval before victims are knocked into the Rift.

advice.generic: Treat this as the Upheaval assignment hit: stabilize the targets and get them working on Rift Manifestations.
advice.healer: Pre-position healing for the selected players before they are knocked away.
advice.dps: After the hit, use the realm window to handle Manifestations.

1282073.notes: DB2 child damage spell for Alndust Upheaval.

1262289.name: Alndust Upheaval
1262289.summary: Splits Nature damage near the impact, knocks victims into the air, and grants Alnsight.

advice.generic: Stack the assigned players for the split and be ready for the realm transition.
advice.tank: Do not drag the boss through the stack point while Upheaval resolves.
advice.healer: Cover the split hit and the first seconds after victims enter the Rift.
advice.dps: Soak only if assigned; after entering the Rift, kill or strip Manifestations quickly.

1246827.name: Alndust Upheaval
1246827.summary: The tank impact portion of Alndust Upheaval.

advice.generic: This is the heavy physical impact tied to Upheaval.
advice.tank: Use mitigation for the impact and keep the boss positioned for the assigned split group.
advice.healer: Pair tank healing with the raid split hit.

1246827.notes: DB2 child spell referenced by Alndust Upheaval.

1258610.name: Rift Emergence
1258610.summary: Raid damage followed by Manifestations emerging throughout the Rift.

advice.generic: Treat Rift Emergence as an add-control checkpoint. Manifestations need to be handled before they reach Chimaerus.
advice.tank: Be ready to stabilize add pickup or boss movement after the roar.
advice.healer: Top the raid before Manifestations begin adding Rift Sickness pressure.
advice.dps: Swap quickly; Manifestations reaching the boss turn into Cannibalized Essence stacks.

1250953.name: Rift Sickness
1250953.summary: A healing absorb applied as Manifestations emerge within the Rift.

advice.generic: Rift Sickness is healed off, not dispelled. Reduce future stacks by controlling Manifestations faster.
advice.healer: Commit direct healing into the absorb and call for Manifestation damage if stacks are snowballing.
advice.dps: Swap to Manifestations quickly; every extra emergence adds healer load.

1245919.name: Alndust Essence
1245919.summary: A pool of essence that damages and slows players standing in it.

advice.generic: Step out of Alndust Essence and keep movement paths clear unless Consuming Miasma needs to remove nearby pools.
advice.tank: Do not park adds or the boss in a way that forces players through pools.
advice.healer: Slow effects can trap players for the next realm or breath mechanic; help them recover.
advice.dps: Do not stand in the pool for uptime.

1245857.name: Alndust Essence
1245857.summary: Alternate Alndust Essence aura used by Consuming Miasma interactions.

advice.generic: Keep these pools organized so Miasma removals can clear them without clipping the raid.
advice.healer: Call pool cleanup if the room is shrinking.
advice.dps: Avoid standing in essence pools unless a mechanic specifically requires clearing them.

1245857.notes: Alternate DB2 aura for Alndust Essence.

1245486.name: Corrupted Devastation
1245486.summary: A sweeping airborne breath that damages and stuns players caught in the area.

advice.generic: Watch Chimaerus in the air and move out of the sweep path before Corrupted Devastation crosses the arena.
advice.tank: Keep players oriented for the safe lane before the boss takes off.
advice.healer: Late movers can be stunned in bad terrain; prepare spot healing after the sweep.
advice.dps: Movement beats uptime here. Clear the path first, then return to Manifestations.

1245406.name: Ravenous Dive
1245406.summary: Chimaerus crashes back down, damages the raid, and consumes remaining Manifestations.

advice.generic: Finish or strip Manifestations before Ravenous Dive so the boss does not gain extra Cannibalized Essence stacks.
advice.tank: Be ready to re-position immediately after the knock-up.
advice.healer: Cover the landing and any Cannibalized Essence follow-up if adds remain.
advice.dps: Swap hard before the dive; leftover Manifestations punish the whole raid.

1245396.name: Consume
1245396.summary: A channel that damages the raid, knocks players back, and consumes remaining Manifestations at the end.

advice.generic: Use Consume as the final warning to clean up Manifestations. Any left alive become boss healing and damage stacks.
advice.healer: Plan healing for the channel and the knockback, then expect extra damage if any adds are consumed.
advice.dps: Finish Manifestations before the channel ends.

1273112.name: Consume
1273112.summary: The periodic raid damage from Chimaerus' Consume channel.

advice.generic: This damage is tied to Consume; stabilize the raid while Manifestations are finished.
advice.healer: Ramp for the channel and watch knockback follow-up positioning.
advice.dps: Use movement and defensives while finishing assigned Manifestations.

1273112.notes: DB2 child damage spell for Consume.

1245844.name: Cannibalized Essence
1245844.summary: Triggered when Chimaerus consumes a Manifestation, damaging the raid, healing the boss, and increasing boss damage.

advice.generic: Cannibalized Essence means add control failed or was late. Tighten Manifestation damage and shroud breaks before the next cycle.
advice.tank: Expect higher boss pressure after stacks.
advice.healer: Extra stacks raise the damage profile; call for personals if the raid falls behind.
advice.dps: Prioritize Manifestations before they reach Chimaerus.

1280655.name: Cannibalized Essence
1280655.summary: The raid-damage child spell from a consumed Manifestation.

advice.generic: Trace this back to Manifestations reaching Chimaerus or being left alive during Consume/Ravenous Dive.
advice.healer: Use this as a signal that add-control failures are adding unavoidable raid damage.
advice.dps: Swap earlier to Manifestations and break Alnshroud shields faster.

1280655.notes: DB2 child damage spell for Cannibalized Essence.

1257087.name: Consuming Miasma
1257087.summary: A Magic DoT that erupts on removal and consumes nearby Alndust Essence pools.

advice.generic: Move Miasma targets near planned pool cleanup, then remove the debuff when nearby players are clear.
advice.healer: Coordinate Magic dispels so the eruption clears useful pools without blasting the raid.
advice.dps: If targeted, move to the assigned cleanup spot and give the healer a clear dispel call.

1257085.name: Consuming Miasma
1257085.summary: Alternate Consuming Miasma spell used during the airborne stage.

advice.generic: Treat this like Consuming Miasma: place the target for pool cleanup and clear the detonation safely.
advice.healer: Delay the Magic dispel until the target is positioned and nearby players are out.
advice.dps: Move with purpose; the dispel timing controls both damage and room cleanup.

1257085.notes: Alternate DB2 spell linked to stage two Consuming Miasma.

1257093.name: Lingering Miasma
1257093.summary: The eruption/lingering damage caused when Consuming Miasma is removed.

advice.generic: Move out of the Miasma eruption and avoid lingering damage zones after the dispel.
advice.healer: Warn before dispelling so players are not clipped by the eruption.
advice.dps: Do not stand near the dispel target unless assigned for the mechanic.

1258192.name: Lingering Miasma
1258192.summary: A lingering Nature damage zone left by Miasma interactions.

advice.generic: Do not stand in Lingering Miasma after the dispel resolves.
advice.healer: Late movers may need spot healing, especially during realm swaps.
advice.dps: Clear out first, then resume damage.

1258192.notes: DB2 description source for Lingering Miasma.

1246653.name: Caustic Phlegm
1246653.summary: A Nature DoT from Chimaerus' phlegm volleys.

advice.generic: Use defensives if Caustic Phlegm overlaps with realm or Manifestation damage.
advice.healer: Track the DoT targets and avoid committing dispels that do not remove it.
advice.dps: If targeted, avoid adding extra avoidable damage while the DoT is ticking.

1272726.name: Rending Tear
1272726.summary: A frontal slash that knocks players away and applies a bleed.

advice.generic: Do not stand in the frontal. If clipped, use bleed removal or a defensive while the DoT is active.
advice.tank: Aim Rending Tear away from the raid and call if you need bleed support.
advice.healer: Track the bleed target and cover them if no bleed cleanse is available.
advice.dps: Move out of the cone; this is preventable damage for anyone not meant to take it.

1249017.name: Fearsome Cry
1249017.summary: A Manifestation scream that damages the raid and causes fear.

advice.generic: Stop or control Haunting Essences where possible; if Fearsome Cry lands, Magic dispel high-risk feared players quickly.
advice.healer: Prioritize dispels on players feared toward pools, breath paths, or realm-swap positions.
advice.dps: Use stops and damage on Haunting Essences before repeated cries overwhelm the raid.

1265940.name: Fearsome Cry
1265940.summary: The fear/DoT aura from Fearsome Cry.

advice.generic: Clear the Magic fear quickly when it would send someone into lethal terrain.
advice.healer: Dispel dangerous pathing first; heal the remaining DoT pressure.
advice.dps: If feared or near a feared player, help with Mass Dispel, tremor-style tools, or defensive utility where available.

1265940.notes: DB2 child aura for Fearsome Cry.

1261997.name: Essence Bolt
1261997.summary: A random-target bolt from Haunting Essences.

advice.generic: Kill or control Haunting Essences before Essence Bolt adds avoidable-feeling spot damage to the pull.
advice.healer: Spot heal bolt targets when multiple Manifestations are active.
advice.dps: Swap to Haunting Essences if bolts are stacking pressure.

1249207.name: Discordant Roar
1249207.summary: Raid damage from Colossal Horrors that ramps with repeated roars.

advice.generic: Colossal Horrors need priority damage before repeated roars ramp out of control.
advice.tank: Keep Horrors controlled and reachable for cleave.
advice.healer: Repeated roars are a ramping raid-damage signal; ask for faster add kills.
advice.dps: Swap quickly to Colossal Horrors, especially if multiple are active.

1262020.name: Colossal Strikes
1262020.summary: A three-hit tank sequence from Colossal Horrors.

advice.generic: Treat Colossal Strikes as tank pressure from active Horrors.
advice.tank: Use mitigation for the strike sequence and call for externals if Horrors overlap with boss hits.
advice.healer: Expect sharp tank spikes while Horrors are alive.
advice.dps: Prioritize Horrors when tank damage is spiking.

1262053.name: Colossal Strikes
1262053.summary: Physical child hit from Colossal Strikes.

advice.generic: This belongs to the Colossal Horror tank-hit sequence.
advice.tank: Pair physical mitigation with the strike sequence.
advice.healer: Watch the tank during active Horror windows.

1262053.notes: DB2 child damage spell for Colossal Strikes.

1262059.name: Colossal Strikes
1262059.summary: Nature child hit from Colossal Strikes.

advice.generic: This belongs to the Colossal Horror tank-hit sequence.
advice.tank: Use mitigation and call if multiple strike windows overlap.
advice.healer: Cover the tank until the Horror dies.

1262059.notes: DB2 child damage spell for Colossal Strikes.

1264756.name: Rift Madness
1264756.summary: Targets players in the Rift; outside allies can stand near them to swap realms and save them from the madness.

advice.generic: When Rift Madness appears, outside-realm players should move near the victims to trigger the realm swap before the horror effect snowballs.
advice.healer: Track victims who are isolated in the Rift and call the swap if they are not being rescued.
advice.dps: If you are outside, help swap; if you are affected, move to the assigned swap point.

1264757.name: Rift Madness
1264757.summary: The active Rift Madness aura that escalates if the victim is not rescued by a realm swap.

advice.generic: Use the realm swap mechanic to rescue affected players before the ticking damage and horror effect become lethal.
advice.healer: Spot heal the victim while the swap is being set up.
advice.dps: Do not leave the affected player isolated in the Rift.

1264757.notes: DB2 child aura for Rift Madness.

1264975.name: Rift Madness
1264975.summary: The expiration burst from Rift Madness around the affected player.

advice.generic: Do not stack on a Rift Madness victim unless you are performing the intended rescue swap.
advice.healer: Expect burst damage if the rescue is late or messy.
advice.dps: Give the victim space after the swap timing is handled.

1264975.notes: DB2 child spell for Rift Madness expiration.

1275637.name: Rift Madness
1275637.summary: The ticking damage from an unresolved Rift Madness victim.

advice.generic: Use this as a signal that the realm-swap rescue was late or missed.
advice.healer: Keep the target alive long enough for the swap, but call if the raid is not moving.
advice.dps: Help execute the swap; do not tunnel while the victim is ticking down.

1275637.notes: DB2 child damage spell for Rift Madness.

1252863.name: Insatiable
1252863.summary: Chimaerus consumes Manifestations that reach Reality near it, triggering Cannibalized Essence.

advice.generic: Keep Manifestations from reaching Chimaerus. Break Alnshroud and kill them before Reality-side movement feeds the boss.
advice.tank: Position so Manifestations have to travel through cleave rather than straight into the boss.
advice.healer: If Insatiable triggers repeatedly, expect rising raid damage from Cannibalized Essence.
advice.dps: Manifestations are priority targets until the path to the boss is clear.
